text: Phosphorylation of skeletal muscle calsequestrin enhances its Ca2+ binding capacity and promotes its association with junctin.

Sentence: Phosphorylation of skeletal muscle calsequestrin enhances its Ca2+ binding capacity and promotes its association with junctin.

text: We examined the influence of phosphorylation of calsequestrin on its ability to store calcium , to polymerise and to regulate ryanodine receptors by binding to triadin and junctin.
text_with_entity_marker: We examined the influence of phosphorylation of [E1]calsequestrin[/E1] on its ability to store calcium , to polymerise and to regulate ryanodine receptors by binding to triadin and [E2]junctin[/E2].
Sentence: We examined the influence of phosphorylation of calsequestrin on its ability to store calcium , to polymerise and to regulate ryanodine receptors by binding to triadin and junctin.

text: Phosphorylation was required for calsequestrin binding to junctin when calcium concentration was low ( 100 nM ) , and ryanodine receptors were activated by dephosphorylated calsequestrin when it bound to triadin alone.
text_with_entity_marker: Phosphorylation was required for [E1]calsequestrin[/E1] binding to [E2]junctin[/E2] when calcium concentration was low ( 100 nM ) , and ryanodine receptors were activated by dephosphorylated calsequestrin when it bound to triadin alone.
Sentence: Phosphorylation was required for calsequestrin binding to junctin when calcium concentration was low ( 100 nM ) , and ryanodine receptors were activated by dephosphorylated calsequestrin when it bound to triadin alone.

text: The myosin-binding protein C motif binds to F-actin in a phosphorylation-sensitive manner.
text_with_entity_marker: The [E1]myosin-binding protein C[/E1] motif binds to [E2]F-actin[/E2] in a phosphorylation-sensitive manner.
Sentence: The myosin-binding protein C motif binds to F-actin in a phosphorylation-sensitive manner.

text: Phosphorylation of  the MyBP-C regulatory motif, or m-domain, reduced binding to actin (reduced B(max)) and eliminated actin cross-linking.
text_with_entity_marker: Phosphorylation of  the [E1]MyBP-C[/E1] regulatory motif, or m-domain, reduced binding to [E2]actin[/E2] (reduced B(max)) and eliminated actin cross-linking.
Sentence: Phosphorylation of  the MyBP-C regulatory motif, or m-domain, reduced binding to actin (reduced B(max)) and eliminated actin cross-linking.

text: These results suggest that the N terminus of cMyBP-C interacts with F-actin through multiple distinct binding sites and that binding at one or more sites is reduced by phosphorylation.
text_with_entity_marker: These results suggest that the N terminus of [E1]cMyBP-C[/E1] interacts with [E2]F-actin[/E2] through multiple distinct binding sites and that binding at one or more sites is reduced by phosphorylation.
Sentence: These results suggest that the N terminus of cMyBP-C interacts with F-actin through multiple distinct binding sites and that binding at one or more sites is reduced by phosphorylation.

text: Low to high Ca2+ -switch causes phosphorylation and association of desmocollin 3 with plakoglobin and desmoglein 3 in cultured keratinocytes.
text_with_entity_marker: Low to high Ca2+ -switch causes phosphorylation and association of [E1]desmocollin 3[/E1] with [E2]plakoglobin and desmoglein 3[/E2] in cultured keratinocytes.
Sentence: Low to high Ca2+ -switch causes phosphorylation and association of desmocollin 3 with plakoglobin and desmoglein 3 in cultured keratinocytes.

text: These results suggest that both the binding of Dsc3 to plakoglobin and Dsc3 phosphorylation are involved in Dsc3 binding to Dsg3 during Ca2+ -induced desmosome assembly.
text_with_entity_marker: These results suggest that both the binding of [E1]Dsc3[/E1] to plakoglobin and Dsc3 phosphorylation are involved in Dsc3 binding to [E2]Dsg3[/E2] during Ca2+ -induced desmosome assembly.
Sentence: These results suggest that both the binding of Dsc3 to plakoglobin and Dsc3 phosphorylation are involved in Dsc3 binding to Dsg3 during Ca2+ -induced desmosome assembly.

text: Phosphorylation of plant translation initiation factors by CK2 enhances the in vitro interaction of multifactor complex components.
text_with_entity_marker: Phosphorylation of plant [E1]translation initiation factors[/E1] by CK2 enhances the in vitro interaction of [E2]multifactor complex components[/E2].
Sentence: Phosphorylation of plant translation initiation factors by CK2 enhances the in vitro interaction of multifactor complex components.

text: These two properties were mutually exclusive ; removal of the C terminus enhanced actin binding of ACTN4 mutants while limiting EGF -induced phosphorylation , and conversely EGF -stimulated phosphorylation of ACTN4 decreased its affinity to actin.
text_with_entity_marker: These two properties were mutually exclusive ; removal of the C terminus enhanced [E1]actin[/E1] binding of [E2]ACTN4[/E2] mutants while limiting EGF -induced phosphorylation , and conversely EGF -stimulated phosphorylation of ACTN4 decreased its affinity to actin.
Sentence: These two properties were mutually exclusive ; removal of the C terminus enhanced actin binding of ACTN4 mutants while limiting EGF -induced phosphorylation , and conversely EGF -stimulated phosphorylation of ACTN4 decreased its affinity to actin.

text: Interestingly, a phosphomimetic of tyrosine 265 (which can be found in carcinoma cells and lies near the K255E mutation that causes focal segmental glomerulosclerosis) demonstrated increased actin binding activity and susceptibility of ACTN4 to calpain-mediated cleavage; this variant also retarded cell spreading.
text_with_entity_marker: Interestingly, a phosphomimetic of tyrosine 265 (which can be found in carcinoma cells and lies near the K255E mutation that causes focal segmental glomerulosclerosis) demonstrated increased [E1]actin[/E1] binding activity and susceptibility of [E2]ACTN4[/E2] to calpain-mediated cleavage; this variant also retarded cell spreading.
Sentence: Interestingly, a phosphomimetic of tyrosine 265 (which can be found in carcinoma cells and lies near the K255E mutation that causes focal segmental glomerulosclerosis) demonstrated increased actin binding activity and susceptibility of ACTN4 to calpain-mediated cleavage; this variant also retarded cell spreading.

text: An F-actin binding assay in vitro showed that Y4E/Y31E , a mimetic of diphosphorylated ACTN4 , bound F-actin slightly compared with wild type ( WT ).
text_with_entity_marker: An [E1]F-actin[/E1] binding assay in vitro showed that Y4E/Y31E , a mimetic of diphosphorylated [E2]ACTN4[/E2] , bound F-actin slightly compared with wild type ( WT ).
Sentence: An F-actin binding assay in vitro showed that Y4E/Y31E , a mimetic of diphosphorylated ACTN4 , bound F-actin slightly compared with wild type ( WT ).

text: These results suggest that EGF regulates the actin binding activity of ACTN4 by inducing tyrosyl-directed phosphorylation.
text_with_entity_marker: These results suggest that EGF regulates the [E1]actin[/E1] binding activity of [E2]ACTN4[/E2] by inducing tyrosyl-directed phosphorylation.
